role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script (Arabic/Latin) and bank name etymology.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Noted signage, flags, and taxi colors.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues like fence styles and vehicle models.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Tunisia using strong linguistic and regulatory evidence (UIB bank, flag) supported by landscape and meta cues. The agents stayed in their lanes and provided consistent, image-grounded reasoning.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified Arabic and Latin text.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described white-washed architecture and sunny climate.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified the dense green tree canopy.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly noted the flag and yellow taxi.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified the fence style and vehicle types.
